list.name: activity_id
list.label: Activity
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, name || ' (' || TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ')' AS __text FROM activities ORDER BY date DESC

targets.rawSql: SELECT lat AS "latitude", lng AS "longitude", CASE '${map_metric}' WHEN 'speed_kmh' THEN speed_kmh WHEN 'hr' THEN hr WHEN 'power' THEN power END AS "metric", time_offset FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND lat IS NOT NULL AND lng IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time_offset;

WITH lthr AS (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY max_hr) AS thr FROM activities WHERE max_hr IS NOT NULL AND max_hr > 0), data AS (SELECT CASE WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 0.68 THEN 'z1' WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 0.83 THEN 'z2' WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 0.94 THEN 'z3' WHEN s.hr < lthr.thr * 1.05 THEN 'z4' ELSE 'z5' END AS z FROM activity_streams s, lthr WHERE s.activity_id = ${activity_id} AND s.hr IS NOT NULL AND s.hr > 0) SELECT 'HR' AS "x", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z1'), 0) AS "Z1 Recovery", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z2'), 0) AS "Z2 Endurance", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z3'), 0) AS "Z3 Tempo", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z4'), 0) AS "Z4 Threshold", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z5'), 0) AS "Z5 VO2max";

WITH ftp AS (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY avg_power) AS ftp_val FROM activities WHERE avg_power IS NOT NULL AND avg_power > 0), data AS (SELECT CASE WHEN s.power < ftp.ftp_val * 0.55 THEN 'z1' WHEN s.power < ftp.ftp_val * 0.75 THEN 'z2' WHEN s.power < ftp.ftp_val * 0.90 THEN 'z3' WHEN s.power < ftp.ftp_val * 1.05 THEN 'z4' WHEN s.power < ftp.ftp_val * 1.20 THEN 'z5' ELSE 'z6' END AS z FROM activity_streams s, ftp WHERE s.activity_id = ${activity_id} AND s.power IS NOT NULL AND s.power > 0) SELECT 'Power' AS "x", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z1'), 0) AS "Z1 Recovery", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z2'), 0) AS "Z2 Endurance", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z3'), 0) AS "Z3 Tempo", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z4'), 0) AS "Z4 Threshold", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z5'), 0) AS "Z5 VO2max", COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data WHERE z='z6'), 0) AS "Z6 Anaerobic";

WITH deltas AS (SELECT time_offset, hr, power, speed_kmh, altitude_m, cadence, COALESCE(speed_kmh, 0) / 3600.0 * (time_offset - LAG(time_offset, 1, time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS dist_delta, altitude_m - LAG(altitude_m) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset) AS alt_delta FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id}), cumulative AS (SELECT time_offset, hr, power, speed_kmh, altitude_m, cadence, alt_delta, SUM(dist_delta) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS dist_km FROM deltas), splits AS (SELECT FLOOR(dist_km)::int + 1 AS km, COUNT(*) AS seconds, ROUND(AVG(speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) AS avg_speed, ROUND(AVG(hr)::numeric, 0) AS avg_hr, ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(power, 0))::numeric, 0) AS avg_power, ROUND(AVG(NULLIF(cadence, 0))::numeric, 0) AS avg_cadence, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN alt_delta > 0 THEN alt_delta ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric, 0) AS elev_gain FROM cumulative WHERE dist_km >= 0 GROUP BY FLOOR(dist_km)::int) SELECT km AS "KM", CASE WHEN seconds = MIN(seconds) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' WHEN seconds = MAX(seconds) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' ELSE '' END || TO_CHAR(seconds * interval '1 second', 'MI:SS') AS "Pace", CASE WHEN avg_speed = MAX(avg_speed) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' WHEN avg_speed = MIN(avg_speed) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' ELSE '' END || avg_speed::text AS "Avg Speed", CASE WHEN avg_hr IS NULL THEN '—' WHEN avg_hr = MIN(avg_hr) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' || avg_hr::text WHEN avg_hr = MAX(avg_hr) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' || avg_hr::text ELSE avg_hr::text END AS "Avg HR", CASE WHEN avg_power IS NULL THEN '—' WHEN avg_power = MAX(avg_power) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' || avg_power::text WHEN avg_power = MIN(avg_power) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' || avg_power::text ELSE avg_power::text END AS "Avg Power", CASE WHEN avg_cadence IS NULL THEN '—' WHEN avg_cadence = MAX(avg_cadence) OVER () THEN '🟢 ' || avg_cadence::text WHEN avg_cadence = MIN(avg_cadence) OVER () THEN '🔴 ' || avg_cadence::text ELSE avg_cadence::text END AS "Cadence", elev_gain AS "Elev Gain (m)" FROM splits WHERE km < (SELECT MAX(km) FROM splits) ORDER BY km;

WITH deltas AS (
  SELECT
    time_offset, speed_kmh,
    altitude_m,
    COALESCE(speed_kmh, 0) / 3600.0 *
      (time_offset - LAG(time_offset, 1, time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS dist_delta
  FROM activity_streams
  WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id}
)
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(dist_delta) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)::numeric, 2) AS "Distance (km)",
  speed_kmh AS "Speed (km/h)",
  altitude_m AS "Elevation (m)"
FROM deltas
ORDER BY 1;

WITH deltas AS (
  SELECT
    time_offset, hr,
    power,
    COALESCE(speed_kmh, 0) / 3600.0 *
      (time_offset - LAG(time_offset, 1, time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS dist_delta
  FROM activity_streams
  WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id}
)
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(dist_delta) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)::numeric, 2) AS "Distance (km)",
  hr AS "HR (bpm)",
  power AS "Power (W)"
FROM deltas
ORDER BY 1;

WITH deltas AS (
  SELECT
    time_offset, cadence,
    COALESCE(speed_kmh, 0) / 3600.0 *
      (time_offset - LAG(time_offset, 1, time_offset) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset)) AS dist_delta
  FROM activity_streams
  WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id}
)
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(dist_delta) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING)::numeric, 2) AS "Distance (km)",
  cadence AS "Cadence (rpm)"
FROM deltas
ORDER BY 1;

WITH rolling AS (SELECT time_offset, AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_30s FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) SELECT ROUND(POWER(AVG(POWER(rolling_30s, 4)), 0.25)::numeric, 0) AS "NP (W)" FROM rolling WHERE rolling_30s IS NOT NULL;

WITH ftp AS (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY avg_power) AS ftp_val FROM activities WHERE avg_power IS NOT NULL AND avg_power > 0), rolling AS (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_30s FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) SELECT ROUND((POWER(AVG(POWER(rolling_30s, 4)), 0.25) / ftp.ftp_val)::numeric, 2) AS "IF" FROM rolling, ftp WHERE rolling_30s IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ftp.ftp_val;

WITH rolling AS (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_30s FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0), np AS (SELECT POWER(AVG(POWER(rolling_30s, 4)), 0.25) AS np_val FROM rolling WHERE rolling_30s IS NOT NULL) SELECT ROUND((np.np_val / a.avg_power)::numeric, 2) AS "VI" FROM np, activities a WHERE a.id = ${activity_id} AND a.avg_power > 0;

WITH rolling AS (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 299 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_5min, AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 1199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_20min FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) SELECT ROUND(MAX(avg_5min)::numeric, 0) AS "Best 5min (W)", ROUND(MAX(avg_20min)::numeric, 0) AS "Best 20min (W)" FROM rolling;
SELECT ROUND((distance_m / 1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Distance" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT ROUND(elevation_m::numeric, 0) AS "Elevation" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT duration_s AS "Duration" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT calories AS "Calories" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT ROUND(avg_speed_kmh::numeric, 1) AS "Speed" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT ROUND((SELECT MAX(speed_kmh) FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND speed_kmh IS NOT NULL)::numeric, 1) AS "Max Speed";
SELECT ROUND(tss::numeric, 0) AS "TSS" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT avg_power AS "Power" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT max_power AS "Max Power" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT avg_hr AS "HR" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT max_hr AS "Max HR" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};
SELECT avg_cadence AS "Cadence" FROM activities WHERE id = ${activity_id};

SELECT d.ts AS "time", d.best_power AS "Best Power (W)" FROM (
SELECT '2000-01-01 00:00:05'::timestamp AS ts, ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) AS best_power FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '2000-01-01 00:00:10', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '2000-01-01 00:00:30', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '2000-01-01 00:01:00', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 59 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '2000-01-01 00:02:00', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 119 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '2000-01-01 00:05:00', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 299 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '2000-01-01 00:10:00', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 599 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '2000-01-01 00:20:00', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 1199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '2000-01-01 01:00:00', ROUND(MAX(avg_p)::numeric, 0) FROM (SELECT AVG(power) OVER (ORDER BY time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 3599 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_p FROM activity_streams WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0) s WHERE avg_p IS NOT NULL
) d WHERE d.best_power IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.ts;

WITH ftp AS (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY avg_power) AS ftp_val FROM activities WHERE avg_power IS NOT NULL AND avg_power > 0), buckets AS (SELECT FLOOR(power / 10) * 10 AS bucket, COUNT(*) / 60.0 AS mins, CASE WHEN power < ftp.ftp_val * 0.55 THEN 'Z1 Recovery' WHEN power < ftp.ftp_val * 0.75 THEN 'Z2 Endurance' WHEN power < ftp.ftp_val * 0.90 THEN 'Z3 Tempo' WHEN power < ftp.ftp_val * 1.05 THEN 'Z4 Threshold' WHEN power < ftp.ftp_val * 1.20 THEN 'Z5 VO2max' ELSE 'Z6 Anaerobic' END AS zone FROM activity_streams, ftp WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND power IS NOT NULL AND power > 0 GROUP BY bucket, zone) SELECT bucket::int AS "Power (W)", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z1 Recovery'), 0) AS "Z1 Recovery", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z2 Endurance'), 0) AS "Z2 Endurance", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z3 Tempo'), 0) AS "Z3 Tempo", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z4 Threshold'), 0) AS "Z4 Threshold", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z5 VO2max'), 0) AS "Z5 VO2max", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z6 Anaerobic'), 0) AS "Z6 Anaerobic" FROM buckets GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket;

WITH lthr AS (SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY max_hr) AS thr FROM activities WHERE max_hr IS NOT NULL AND max_hr > 0), buckets AS (SELECT FLOOR(hr / 5) * 5 AS bucket, COUNT(*) / 60.0 AS mins, CASE WHEN hr < lthr.thr * 0.68 THEN 'Z1 Recovery' WHEN hr < lthr.thr * 0.83 THEN 'Z2 Endurance' WHEN hr < lthr.thr * 0.94 THEN 'Z3 Tempo' WHEN hr < lthr.thr * 1.05 THEN 'Z4 Threshold' ELSE 'Z5 VO2max' END AS zone FROM activity_streams, lthr WHERE activity_id = ${activity_id} AND hr IS NOT NULL AND hr > 0 GROUP BY bucket, zone) SELECT bucket::int AS "HR (bpm)", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z1 Recovery'), 0) AS "Z1 Recovery", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z2 Endurance'), 0) AS "Z2 Endurance", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z3 Tempo'), 0) AS "Z3 Tempo", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z4 Threshold'), 0) AS "Z4 Threshold", COALESCE(SUM(mins) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'Z5 VO2max'), 0) AS "Z5 VO2max" FROM buckets GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket;
